title: Skies & Ships (S&S)
description: Use your imagination to build ships/ airships to sail the seas, or fly in the sky with this modpack using Valkyrien Skies.
body:
# Skies & Ships
This modpack lets you sail the seas, fly in the sky with airships, or explore the world with cars! You can make ships or airships made from YOUR imagination! The mods below are what this modpack is mainly about:
## Create
This mod uses **Create** to power things such as trains in this mod. It is also used (if properly engineered) to create motors for a boat/ship!
## Valkyrien Skies
This mod mainly focuses around the mod **Valkyrien Skies.** Fun fact: That is why the modpack is named **Skies & Ships!** The mod in this modpack is intended to be used to make contraptions such as airships, planes, or boats/ships!
